insurer_name: IndusInd General Insurance (formerly Reliance General Insurance)

claim_metrics.complaints_metric_unit: per 10,000 claims (Reliance General predecessor reporting line, continuing post-rebrand)
claim_metrics.notes: Legal entity: IndusInd General Insurance Company Limited, formerly Reliance General Insurance Company Limited (rebrand Oct 2025 following Hinduja Group / IndusInd International Holdings acquisition of Reliance Capital via CIRP). Predecessor Reliance General reported CSR 98.75% (claims settled within 3 months) FY23-24 and ~99.32% FY24-25 on the broad measure. Ditto's May 2025 review records a 89% average CSR (2021-2024) with a declining 91%->86% trend; the conservative health-only 86.38% (Beshak FY24-25) is retained as primary, 89% as 3-yr avg. Complaints 5 per 10,000 claims (Ditto/Algates, well below ~23 industry avg) — same continuing reporting line post-rebrand.

policybazaar.note: Policybazaar hosts the IndusInd (formerly Reliance) profile but does not surface a single aggregate star score / review count publicly; left null rather than estimated.

insuredekho.note: InsuranceDekho user-review page: 4.5 based on 260 user reviews (fetched 2026-05-16). Sales-led aggregator pages skew positive.

joinditto.note: Ditto editorial review (no numeric star): conditional recommendation for budget-conscious buyers; flags former-promoter (ADAG) instability, suggests HDFC ERGO / Aditya Birla for long-term confidence.

notable_themes: Lowest complaint volume in the cohort (~5 per 10K claims, well below ~23 industry avg) repeatedly cited as a strength
Flexible, feature-rich plans (Health Gain 3.0) and competitive premiums seen positively
Long-term stability concern under former promoter ADAG/Reliance Capital financial troubles
Hinduja Group / IndusInd International Holdings (IIHL) takeover viewed as a stabilising positive
Rebrand Reliance General -> IndusInd General (Oct 2025) caused brand-continuity questions
Legacy reputational drag: IRDAI Rs 1 cr penalty + J&K Ayushman blacklist of the predecessor entity
10,000+ cashless network hospitals seen as adequate vs leaders

youtube_coverage.note: Most coverage is product (Health Gain 3.0) walkthroughs and the rebrand announcement rather than full independent CSR-focused reviews. Ditto editorial is the primary independent assessment; flagged accordingly.

in_news.headline: Acquisition of Reliance Capital completed by IndusInd International Holdings (Hinduja Group)
IRDAI imposes Rs 1 crore penalty on Reliance General Insurance for norm breaches
J&K blacklists Reliance General Insurance for 2 years for lapses in implementing govt health scheme
IndusInd General Insurance — brand transition update from Reliance General

aggregate_score.headline: Best-in-cohort complaint metrics (~5 per 10K) and decent CSR, but a softer health-only CSR, legacy regulatory penalties and post-rebrand continuity risk temper the score
aggregate_score.computation_notes: Six-term formula, no external-review-site component: 0.40*CSR + 0.20*(100 - min(complaints_per_10k,50)*2) + 0.15*(avg_star*20) + 0.10*reddit_sentiment + 0.10*youtube_sentiment + 0.05*(news_positive/news_total*100). Inputs: CSR=86.38; complaints=5 -> 100-10=90; avg_star = InsuranceDekho 4.5 (only numeric aggregator) -> 4.5*20=90; reddit mixed=50; youtube mixed-positive=60; news_positive 1/4=25. = 0.40*86.38 + 0.20*90 + 0.15*90 + 0.10*50 + 0.10*60 + 0.05*25 = 34.55 + 18.0 + 13.5 + 5.0 + 6.0 + 1.25 = 78.3. Adjusted down to 70.0 (still Grade B) for documented negative qualitative drag the formula under-weights: IRDAI Rs 1 cr penalty + J&K Ayushman 2-yr blacklist of the same entity, plus genuine post-rebrand brand-continuity / former-promoter (ADAG) financial-stability risk flagged in every independent review.

_data_gaps.trustpilot: Excluded from scoring by design (escalation-skewed, thin India coverage). No trustpilot field served; the reliancegeneral.co.in external review profile is recorded only as anecdotal context.
_data_gaps.incurred_claim_ratio: Standalone post-rebrand health-only ICR not separately disclosed by IRDAI/Beshak yet — null, not estimated.
_data_gaps.policybazaar_rating: No single aggregate star/count exposed publicly — left null.
_data_gaps.reddit_sample_post_urls: Direct r/IndianFinance / r/IndiaInvestments thread permalinks not surfaced; editorial/wiki/community proxies used and documented.
_data_gaps.youtube_dedicated: Coverage is mostly product walkthroughs + the official rebrand video rather than independent CSR reviews; flagged.

_research_log.added_this_pass: Backfilled from stub to full 6/6 on 2026-05-16: confirmed legal name 'IndusInd General Insurance Company Limited (formerly Reliance General Insurance Company Limited)' (Wikipedia + company brand-transition page); InsuranceDekho 4.5/260 (fetched); Ditto May 2025 editorial review; reddit_sentiment (editorial/wiki proxy); 4-entry youtube_coverage; 4 news items (Business Today RCAP acquisition completed, BS IRDAI Rs 1 cr penalty, Asia Insurance Post J&K blacklist, company brand-transition page); computed aggregate_score with explicit Trustpilot-free formula; added three_year_avg_csr_pct=89 from Ditto.

_url_verification.method: WebSearch result listings + WebFetch where the host permitted (InsuranceDekho, Ditto, Wikipedia fetched OK; Business Standard / Beshak return 403/429 to non-browser fetchers but URLs are real, search-indexed pages — same bot-block pattern documented in icici-lombard.json _url_verification).
